seo_brief.title: SEO Content Brief
seo_brief.template:
SEO content brief for '{keyword}'. Target: {target_audience}. Competing: {competitors}.

Include: word count, H1-H3 structure, semantic keywords, meta title/description, content angle to beat competitors.

ad_copy.title: High-Converting Ad Copy
ad_copy.template:
Write 5 {platform} ads for {product} targeting {audience}. Goal: {goal}.

Each: headline, body, CTA, psychological trigger. Include A/B test hypothesis.

email_sequence.title: Email Nurture Sequence
email_sequence.template:
Write {num_emails}-email nurture for {product} targeting {audience}.

Each email: subject line, preview text, body, CTA, send timing. Arc: awareness to decision.

landing_page.title: Landing Page Copy
landing_page.template:
Write landing page copy for {product} targeting {icp}. Main benefit: {main_benefit}.

Sections: hero headline, 3 value props, social proof, features, FAQ, 3 CTA variations.

viral_hook.title: Viral Hook Generator
viral_hook.template:
Generate 10 viral opening hooks for {platform} about {topic} for {audience}.

Formats: controversial opinion, surprising statistic, story opener, counterintuitive insight, pattern interrupt.
